title: High Voltage
lines: You smash the remaining ice and pry open the hatch. Inside is an electrical box with two massive conductor coils.
Smeared in red paint on the inside of the hatch are the words: JUMPSTART ME.
The heat in the room is becoming unbearable. Your vision is starting to blur.

options.desc: Jam the cattle prod against the coils to surge the system!
Grab the coils and try to bridge the connection with your hands
Wait, praying for a miracle as you slowly cook
